name: playground-template

scripts.publish:summit: playground deploy --env summit --no-build --buildDir dist --domain playground-template --signer dev --suri "$MNEMONIC" --no-contracts --playground --moddable --tag utility

_comment_overrides: @polkadot-api/json-rpc-provider override is a workaround for an upstream packaging bug (mirrors what product-sdk's monorepo does). @novasamatech/host-api* pinned to exact 0.8.10 to match product-sdk-host@0.10.3, which requires host-api ^0.8.9. NOTE: host-api 0.8.4+ once had a handshake regression against older Polkadot Desktop builds; product-sdk-host@0.10.3 now hard-requires ^0.8.9, indicating it's resolved on current builds — but still verify the Host API connects in Desktop before shipping. If it hangs on 'Polkadot host is not ready', the only safe fallback is the older signer 0.7.0 / host 0.10.0 / host-api 0.8.7 set. ws pinned ^8.21.0 to clear GHSA-96hv-2xvq-fx4p (DoS) in transitive smoldot/@polkadot deps; drop once upstream ranges move past it.
